MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - SCOTT ROLAND BULLERWELL, TEL. NO. 254-3826, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF GURSON DANG'S DEMURRER TO GENERAL DENIAL IS Overruled. Although the court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers, a review of the general denial and the affirmative defenses show that all of them are adequately pled. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077
